title: Nursery Rhyme. CCIV. Riddles.
content:
[A horse-shoer.]

        What shoe-maker makes shoes without leather,
        With all the four elements put together?
            Fire and water, earth and air;
            Ev'ry customer has two pair.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCIV. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
